title: Something In The Night
description: Adds a psychosis system with multiple mental states, a portable detector, special tea items, and night-based mechanics that affect the player's behavior.
body:
🔮 Something in the Night (SITN)

🌙 Something in the Night is an atmospheric horror mod that introduces a psychosis system into Minecraft.

As night falls, the world slowly begins to change. Darkness, loneliness, and silence affect the player’s mind. Staying outside at night without light or safety will increase your psychosis, causing unsettling ambient sounds, whispers, and a growing sense that you are not alone.

🏠 Your home is your sanctuary.
Being near your bed, inside your house, or holding a light source helps reduce psychosis and regain control. But the longer you remain exposed to the night, the harder it becomes to stay sane.

🔊 Dynamic night ambience reacts to your mental state — from subtle noises to disturbing sounds as psychosis grows.

🧠 Psychosis is not just a number.
At high levels, the effects become permanent, changing how the game feels and plays.

✨ Features:

🌑 Night-based psychosis system

🔊 Random and looping ambient horror sounds

🏠 Home and light-based sanity protection

📟 Psychosis detector with HUD display

🌙 Immersive, slow-burn horror atmosphere

⚠️ The night is watching you.
Light helps. Home helps.
But something is always out there.
